title: DeepSynth Leaderboard Submission
description: Schema for a single submission to the DeepSynth benchmark leaderboard.

schema_version.description: Version of this submission schema. Must match the current release.

scaffold.description: Agent scaffold type. Use 'Custom' only if none of the standard options fit, and describe it in scaffold_notes.

scaffold_notes.description: Optional short description, required if scaffold == 'Custom'.

tools_used.description: Tools the agent had access to during evaluation.

tools_notes.description: Optional clarification (e.g. specific search provider, browser version).

contact_email.description: Contact for questions or retraction requests. Not displayed publicly.

paper_url.description: Optional link to a paper or technical report describing the method.

code_url.description: Public URL to the code that produced these predictions. Required for leaderboard acceptance.

submission_date.description: ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD) when predictions were generated.

split.description: Which split was evaluated. Only 'test' and 'full' submissions are eligible for the public leaderboard.

num_seeds.description: Number of independent runs averaged to produce these predictions. Minimum 1.

uses_external_retrieval.description: Whether the agent used live external retrieval (web, APIs) during inference.

notes.description: Optional free-form notes shown on the leaderboard detail page.

predictions.description: Map from task ID (zero-padded 3-digit string) to the agent's answer.

answer.description: The agent's answer for this task. Format follows DeepSynth task-specific schema (see intermediate_answers_schemas/).

cost_usd.description: Optional: estimated USD cost to produce this answer (API + compute).

latency_s.description: Optional: wall-clock time in seconds to produce this answer.

num_tool_calls.description: Optional: total tool invocations made while solving this task.

num_tokens_input.description: Optional: total input tokens consumed across all LLM calls for this task.

num_tokens_output.description: Optional: total output tokens produced across all LLM calls for this task.

trace_url.description: Optional: link to a full trace (e.g. LangSmith, Weights & Biases) for this task.
